attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SH.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE AS L0_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FW2Y.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FW2Y.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
FW2Y.FISCAL_WEEK_NAME,
CASE WHEN FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLG,
SREP.SALES_REP_NUM,
SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
RTMS.L1_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
RTMS.L2_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
RTMS.L3_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
RTMS.L4_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
BKGS.SERVICE_FLG,
BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG,
RO_LOOKUP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
--RO_LOOKUP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
PRDT_CLSFTN.PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,                       
SUM(COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(PRDT_CLSFTN.ALLOCATION_PCT,1)) AS ACTUAL_AMT,
SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD='ERP' THEN (COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(PRDT_CLSFTN.ALLOCATION_PCT,1))  ELSE 0 END) ORACLE_ACTUAL_AMT,
SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.DSV_FLG='N' AND BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('POS','POS_ADJ')  THEN (COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(PRDT_CLSFTN.ALLOCATION_PCT,1))  ELSE 0 END) POS_AMT,
SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.DSV_FLG='Y' AND BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('POS','POS_ADJ')  THEN (COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(PRDT_CLSFTN.ALLOCATION_PCT,1))  ELSE 0 END) DSV_AMT,
SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('AR','SLS_ADJ') THEN (COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(PRDT_CLSFTN.ALLOCATION_PCT,1))  ELSE 0 END) EIS_CM_AMT,
SUM(CASE WHEN BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD='XAAS' THEN (COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT*COMP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*COALESCE(PRDT_CLSFTN.ALLOCATION_PCT,1))  ELSE 0 END) XAAS_AMT ,
/*08-NOV-2020 START */
CASE WHEN PRD.BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME IN ('FlexPlan-OA Non-EA','FlexPlan-Non EA') THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE PRD.BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME END BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME
/*08-NOV-2020 END */
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_BY_WEEK BKGS
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE PDATE
ON PDATE.DUMMY_COLUMN_PI='Y'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_WEEK_TO_YEAR FW2Y
ON  BKGS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT=FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT
AND FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT-2 AND PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_BOOKINGS RO_LOOKUP
ON RO_LOOKUP.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD=BKGS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
/*08-NOV-2020 START */
INNER JOIN COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN PRD  
ON BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY=PRD.ITEM_KEY
/*08-NOV-2020 END */
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SH
ON SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND SH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP SREP
ON BKGS.SALES_REP_NUM=SREP.SALES_REP_NUM
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_TMS_SLS_ALOC_PRD_ALOC COMP
ON COMP.ITEM_KEY =CASE WHEN BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY<0 THEN -999 ELSE BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY END 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_TECH_MKT_SEGMENT RTMS
ON RTMS.TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY = COMP.TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY
AND RTMS.HIERARCHY_TYPE='TMS_ALLOCATED_SALES'
INNER JOIN
(
SELECT
PRODUCT_KEY,
BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD AS PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD,
BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD AS PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
CAST(ALLOCATION_PCT AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS ALLOCATION_PCT,
FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT 
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN PRDT, $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR FQ2Y, $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE IN_PDATE
WHERE PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD<>'COGS' 
AND PRDT.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD NOT IN ('REVENUE')
AND PRDT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT=FQ2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
AND FQ2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN IN_PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT-2 AND IN_PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
) PRDT_CLSFTN 
ON BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY=PRDT_CLSFTN.PRODUCT_KEY  
AND PRDT_CLSFTN.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT=FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
WHERE BKGS.REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG='Y'
AND BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','ATTRIBUTED')
AND CASE WHEN BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='Y' THEN BKGS.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ELSE 'INCLUDE' END NOT IN ('UNKNOWN','WORLDWIDE TRAINING')
GROUP BY 
SH.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
SH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FW2Y.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FW2Y.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
FW2Y.FISCAL_WEEK_NAME,
CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLG,
SREP.SALES_REP_NUM,
SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
RTMS.L1_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
RTMS.L2_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
RTMS.L3_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
RTMS.L4_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
BKGS.SERVICE_FLG,
BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG,
RO_LOOKUP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
PRDT_CLSFTN.PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
/*08-NOV-2020 START */
PRD.BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME,
BKGS.XCAT_FLG,
/*08-NOV-2020 END */
